name: Neewer X12 12inch Tablet Teleprompter
description: Set up your teleprompter shoot almost anywhere, fast, without requiring a truckload of gear with this Neewer X12 Aluminum Alloy Teleprompter with Remote, App, and Carry Case sets up easily on a separately available lightstand, supporting a mirrorless or DSLR camera and using a separately available tablet up to 9.8" as the text monitor.

features.Key Features:: Up to 10' Reading Distance | No Baseplate or Rods Required | Fast Assembly Using Light Stand | Durable, Aluminum Construction
features.What’s in the box?: Neewer X12 Aluminum Alloy Teleprompter with Remote App and Carry Case | Remote Control | Phone Holder | Carrying Case
